3228030.name: Gloomy Tales: Hotel Frightsylvania Collector's Edition
3228030.description:
Prepare to dance till you’re dead in this horrifying yet captivating experience! A mysterious benefactor invites you to a private party... in Romania! Exciting, isn't it? Well, Annabelle is positively ecstatic, so all you can do now is pack your largest suitcase and print out the plane tickets. Make sure you don't forget your Halloween costume, though! A shimmering light in the dark mountains leads you to a gloomy castle. Welcome to Frightsylvania Hotel – your home away from home, where comfort meets mystery and luxury intertwines with secrets. Maybe a few monsters and death traps as well. Wander through the labyrinth of looming halls and underground tunnels and don't mind the itchy feeling in the back of your head like someone's watching you. Because they are…

This Collector's Edition includes:

🎈 Explore a Haunted Hotel!

Wander through the gothic grandeur of Frightsylvania Hotel, with its sprawling ballrooms, dimly lit corridors, and foreboding underground tunnels. Every corner hides new mysteries, and each room drips with atmosphere, as danger—and perhaps something watching—lurks in the dark. Even Dracula himself would feel at home here!

🎈 Intricate Puzzles & Mini-Games!

Put your puzzle-solving skills to the test with a wide array of brain teasers and macabre mini-games. Each challenge brings you closer to unraveling the sinister mysteries of Frightsylvania, offering rewarding achievements for the most determined players!

🎈 Collect Curious Artifacts!

Search every nook and cranny for hidden artifacts, collectibles, and Easter eggs that unlock additional lore. Each discovery immerses you deeper into the twisted history of the castle, revealing secrets about its mysterious benefactor and the eerie residents!

🎈 Choices Matter!

Every decision you make affects the storyline, determining the outcome of key characters, including the enigmatic monsters lurking in the shadows. Will you show mercy or unleash chaos? The choices you make will ripple through the narrative, offering different endings and replayability!
3228030.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 德语, 俄语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
